examples: A large rust-colored gorgonian sea fan perches against a reef in Micronesia.
The relationships between molecular phylogeny and morphological classification are quoted and the key prospects for the study of the phylogeny of Gorgonian are also predicted.
For an adrenaline rush, head to Punta Omo Morto, where a cliff drops 55 meters into the sea and turns into a gorgeous Gorgonian wall.
